21.example_clue: You may not know that blackjack is also called pontoon, but we bet you've heard this other name

180.example_clue: Make the amazing round of tosses seen here in a standard game of darts & you'll score this many points

will smith.example_clue: A star of the Dodgers & a star who dodged bullets in "Bad Boys"

jane seymour.example_clue: A wife of Henry VIII & the star of "Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman"

machine gun kelly.example_clue: A Depression-era gangster & a "Bloody Valentine" musician from Ohio

nick cave.example_clue: Soundsuits artist with the largest ever solo commission at the Smithsonian American Art Museum & the frontman of the Bad Seeds

scrabble.example_clue: B, C, M & P are each worth 3 points in this game

kenken (killer sudoku).example_clue: I'm understandably fond of this game that adds number "cages" & math operations to Sudoku

deuce.example_clue: It's the quicker way to say a 40-40 score in tennis

the cranium.example_clue: This part of the skull that houses & protects your gray matter is sometimes called the braincase

toes.example_clue: The largest one of these appendages, the hallux is made up of 2 phalanx bones & can be quite prone to painful bumps & collisions

the femur.example_clue: This bone, the body's longest, has the classic shape of bones in cartoons, a cylinder with round bumps at each end

red blood cell generation.example_clue: There are 2 types of bone marrow in the body: yellow stores fat & red is the site of hematopoiesis, this process

a girdle.example_clue: You have 3 of these bony structures, 2 pectoral & one pelvic, keeping your limbs attached to your axial skeleton

cornhole.example_clue: My bag went into the hole, but my overhand technique was ruled illegal in this game named for the bags' traditional filling

horseshoes.example_clue: I arced my pitch way too low in this game & instead of getting a ringer, I gave my father-in-law a concussion

frisbee.example_clue: I threw out my back going for a dinger in Kan Jam, a game often called "Trash Can" this, the name of another trademarked toy

croquet.example_clue: I tripped over my own mallet & landed on one of the 9 wire wickets used in this game

jarts (lawn darts).example_clue: I popped a bouncy castle while playing this game that was banned by the Consumer Product Safety Commission in 1988

battleship.example_clue: In this Hasbro game you have to sink 5 of your opponent's vessels before they sink yours

bamboo.example_clue: The traditional Filipino game palo sebo involves climbing up a greased pole made of this treelike grass

double dutch.example_clue: You'll need 2 jump ropes plus some partners to play this game, & no, they needn't be from Holland

bodies bodies bodies.example_clue: Also the title of a 2022 film, this triple-talk game similar to Mafia has you accusing your friends of murder

pachinko.example_clue: An Apple TV show with Anna Sawai shares its name with this Japanese game described as a cross between pinball & a slot machine

mario.example_clue: Jumpman was the original name of this iconic character who debuted in 1981, a couple of years before his bro

elden ring.example_clue: George R.R. Martin helped create the backstory for the game in which players attempt to restore this shattered ring

grand theft auto.example_clue: San Andreas in this long-running game series is a crime-ridden fictional state, not a seismic fault

call of duty.example_clue: This 3-word title comes before "Warzone", "Modern Warfare" & more

arkham asylum.example_clue: An award-winning 2009 game saw Batman facing down the Joker & other villains in this title institution
